name: Turkey Vegetable Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the crackers into fine crumbs.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onion and garlic in 1 tablespoon water over medium-high heat for 3-5 minutes until the water evaporates.
4. Add celery and continue sautéing, stirring for 3 minutes to soften. If the vegetables begin to stick, add additional water as needed.
5. In a large bowl, combine the ground turkey, sautéed vegetables, onion powder, prepared mustard, white pepper (if using), egg white, nutmeg, fine crumb crumbs, and parsley. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. Form the mixture into patties and place them on a baking sheet or shallow pan.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes, or until firm and brown.
